appraisal_events.evidence: « cette lettre outrageante ... avait dû le faire descendre du rang élevé, unique ... dans son estime. Il allait lui devenir moins cher »
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann believes his harsh letter has lowered him in Odette’s esteem and anticipates being less dear to her, a local loss of standing within the relationship.

status_effects.explanation: Swann feels remorse and fears loss of esteem from Odette, weakening his emotional leverage and position.
